zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Thomas Radcliffe於1454年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩爾福德時，他的父親Sir William Radcliffe34歲，母親Jane Trafford31歲。他於大約1457年與Elizabeth Brereton在英國英格蘭藍卡爾奧爾德薩爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1497年4月12日在他的家鄉享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Thomas Radcliffe于1454年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾薩爾福德时，他的父亲Sir William Radcliffe34岁，母亲Jane Trafford31岁。他于大约1457年与Elizabeth Brereton在英国英格兰藍卡爾奧爾德薩爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1497年4月12日在他的家乡享年43岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Thomas Radcliffe was born in 1454, in Salford, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Radcliffe, was 34 and his mother, Jane Trafford, was 31. He married Elizabeth Brereton about 1457, in Ordsall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 12 April 1497, in his hometown, at the age of 43, and was buried in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Thomas Radcliffe est né en 1454, à Salford, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Radcliffe, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Jane Trafford, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Brereton environ 1457, à Ordsall, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 avril 1497, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Thomas Radcliffe 1454 in Salford, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Radcliffe 34 und seine Mutter Jane Trafford 31. Er hat um 1457 in Ordsall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Brereton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. April 1497 im Alter von 43 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Thomas Radcliffe è nato il nel 1454 nel Salford, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William Radcliffe, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Jane Trafford, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Brereton circa 1457, nel Ordsall, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 aprile 1497, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Thomas Radcliffeが1454年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアサルフォードで生まれた時，父Sir William Radcliffeは34歳，母Jane Traffordは31歳であった。約1457年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアオルドサルでElizabeth Breretonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1497年4月12日に故郷で43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Thomas Radcliffe(이)가 1454년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 살퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Radcliffe(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Trafford(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1457년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 르드사에서 Elizabeth Brereton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1497년 4월 12일 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Thomas Radcliffe nasceu em 1454, em Salford, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Radcliffe, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Jane Trafford, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Brereton aproximadamente 1457, em Ordsall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de abril de 1497, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Thomas Radcliffe родился в 1454 г. в местности салфорд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Radcliffe было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Trafford, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Brereton около 1457 г. в местности ордсалл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 12 апреля 1497 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Thomas Radcliffe nació en 1454, en Salford, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Radcliffe, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Jane Trafford, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Brereton aproximadamente 1457, en Ordsall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de abril de 1497, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
